name: Fast Wind Shift
description: Simulates a rapid wind direction change from SW to NW, common during diablo wind events. Tests evacuation route adaptability when fire behavior changes suddenly.

name: Night Evacuation
description: Models evacuation during nighttime hours with reduced visibility and slower civilian response times. Assumes 2AM start with minimal traffic but longer mobilization delays.

name: School Zone Priority
description: Prioritizes evacuation of zones containing schools during school hours. Ignition point near Paradise Elementary with focus on bus route viability.
